overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical coastal settlement. She walks through shallow aquaculture farms, traverses wooden dock walkways, and observes the clear turquoise waters and boats before returning through the village.

events.description: character turns slightly to navigate between crop rows
approaching wooden walkway exit from shallow water

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through a shallow aquaculture farm with rows of yellow cultivated crops growing in the clear turquoise water. A villager works in the water to the left as Aloy navigates between the crop beds toward a wooden walkway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden dock walkway over clear turquoise water

view opens up to reveal expansive ocean bay and distant islands

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock surface
thick rope handrails along the dock edge
thick rope handrails along the dock edge
expansive view of turquoise ocean water with distant landmasses

segments.scene_description: Aloy steps onto a wooden dock walkway elevated above the water, leaving the aquaculture farm behind. She walks along the weathered planks with rope railings as the view opens up to reveal the expansive turquoise bay and distant tropical islands.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock terminus with panoramic ocean view and anchored boats

events.description: stops at end of dock to look down at underwater coral and fish
camera pans down to reveal underwater coral reef and marine life
turns around to head back toward the village

agents.ego_description: standing at the end of the dock observing the boat and underwater scenery before turning back

notable_agents.action: wooden boat anchored in the bay with a person standing on the deck

entered.detail: traditional wooden sailing vessel anchored in the clear water
visible coral formations and fish beneath the clear water surface
distant island with palm trees and rocky shores

segments.scene_description: At the end of the dock, Aloy stops to observe a wooden boat anchored in the bay and looks down at the underwater coral reef visible through the clear turquoise water. After a moment of observation, she turns around to head back toward the village.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal village settlement with tribal architecture and palm trees

events.description: turns back from waterfront into the village center
continues walking through village passing multiple NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking back through the village settlement passing tribal banners and other villagers

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a decorative tribal banner pole

entered.detail: tall wooden poles with colorful tribal banners and decorations
tall palm trees lining the village
cluster of wooden tribal buildings on stilts and platforms

segments.scene_description: Aloy turns back from the waterfront and walks through the coastal village, passing decorative tribal banner poles and palm trees. The wooden walkways lead through the settlement with other villagers visible going about their activities among the stilted buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate confines of an aquaculture farm to an expansive coastal vista before returning into the heart of a tribal village. It begins with Aloy navigating through shallow turquoise waters between rows of yellow cultivated crops, passing a working villager as she moves toward the shore. As she steps onto an elevated wooden dock, the scene opens up to reveal a wide bay dotted with distant tropical islands and weathered rope railings. The camera then pauses at the waterfront to observe an anchored wooden boat and the vibrant coral reefs visible beneath the surface before turning back toward the settlement. Finally, the path leads through the coastal village, passing decorative tribal banners and palm trees as Aloy walks among stilted buildings and active villagers.
